author: vvo
subject: chore(beta): cannot release beta
body:
Since jsDelivr do not care about dist-tags like the @beta tag we were
using on npm:
https://github.com/jsdelivr/jsdelivr/issues/8841#issuecomment-169973962

We cannot provide a release-beta script because then we cannot release
any patch fixes while working on a beta.

At some point if npmcdn.com gains traction, it might be a better
choice for us: https://npmcdn.com/
